source_doc: ESCAP/WMO Typhoon Committee, Verification of Tropical Cyclone Operational Forecast (2015 season), Table 3, JTWC-sub row
notes: mean great-circle errors vs RSMC-Tokyo best track; 12h/36h linearly interpolated (JTWC verifies 24h cadence); radii applied 1:1 (NOT NHC 2/3 percentile scaling)
